title: Mob Battle
description: Mob Battle is an innovative plugin that gives you the tools to create entertaining mob battles!
body:
# What is Mob Battle?

Mob Battle is an innovative plugin that gives you the tools to create entertaining mob battles. See below for more info!


## Commands

    /mb give
    /mb config
    /mb help


## Item Abilities

#### Team Battle Wand

    Left-click: Adds/Removes mobs to/from the red team
    Right-click: Adds/Removes mobs to/from the blue team
    Shift + Left-click: Resets the red team
    Shift + Right-click: Resets the blue team
    Shift + Drop: Starts/Ends the battle


#### Mob Battle Wand

    Right-click: Selects your first entity
    Left-click: Selects your second entity
    Shift + Right-click: Resets your selections
    Shift + Left-click: Starts/Ends the battle


#### Mob Modifier

    Right-click: Toggles mob AI
    Left-click: Toggles mob invincibility
    Shift + Right-click: Toggles mob invisibility
    Shift + Left-click: Restores mob to full HP


#### Mob Vaporizer

    Left-click: Insta-kills the targetted mob
    Right-click: Insta-kills all mobs in a 5-block radius


## Permissions

    mobbattle.commands - Access to all Mob Battle commands.


## Config

```
############################################################
# +------------------------------------------------------+ #
# |                      MobBattle                       | #
# |       Thanks for taking interest in my plugin!       | #
# |        Here are some things you can configure.       | #
# +------------------------------------------------------+ #
############################################################

no-permissions-message: "&cSorry, you do not have the permission to do this."
#This ensures that other mobs won't target those engaged in battle, even if the battling mobs have hit them. (disables Zombified Piglin mob behaviour, etc.)
true1v1: true
actionbar:
  actionbar-messages: true
  ticks-between-actionbar-messages: 1
chat:
  send-non-essential-chat-messages: true
sounds:
  play-sounds: true
  sound-volume: 1.0
```

And that's it! Have fun :)
